description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Doujutsu)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 3

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 19

Components: E, H

This technique can be used in one of two ways:

Sharingan Mirage (Requires Glare (a)): The subject falls unconscious for 1d6+1 rounds, after which it is dazed for 1 round. The subject will lose all memory from 1 round before it fell unconscious to when it became dazed, except highly impactful events.

Technique Copy: You gain a gaze attack, which increases the success chance of your Ninja's Mimicry abilities against any creature affected by the gaze attack (no save, is avoided completely by a creature using avert one's gaze).
